description: Example per-environment approved SHA256 pins for data/governed/uncertainty_governance_policy.json. For hosted CI, store the full JSON in GitHub Environment secret UNCERTAINTY_GOVERNANCE_POLICY_BASELINES_JSON on environment uncertainty-governance-baseline-verification (see .github/workflows/uncertainty-policy-governance-verification.yml). Do not commit production pins. For local deterministic runs, copy to a private path (e.g. gitignored) and pass --baselines to deploy/scripts/verify_uncertainty_policy_baselines.py. Update expected_policy_sha256 and change_review after each approved policy change.
